details.productUrlName: Baron Strucker HYDRA Overlord Surge Foil

customAttributes.description:
Villain spells you cast cost 1 less to cast.
Whenever another Villain you control enters, you may have it connive. Do this only once each turn. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 7/10/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: "Minions of HYDRA! Behold! Our ultimate destiny is at hand!"
